summary: P0 verified: Mentor booking status-filter parity fix works. All 4 endpoints (availability, earliest-slots, book, reschedule) now use {"$in": ["confirmed", "pending", "reschedule_pending"]} consistently. 17/17 focused regression tests pass including the exact bug repro (admin cancels booking -> another user rebooks the same slot without 'conflict' error).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/mentors.py line 242, 633, 651, 887, 1424 — all 4 endpoints now share the same status filter {"$in": ["confirmed", "pending", "reschedule_pending"]}. Verified by grep.

Code smell: The exact booking-conflict logic (forward + backward duration blocking, 30-min slot expansion) is duplicated between /availability (lines ~656-700) and /book (lines ~890-930). Recommend extracting into a single helper like `compute_blocked_slots(bookings, default_duration)` to prevent future drift of the kind this P0 bug was caused by. Same for the mongo filter constant — define `ACTIVE_BOOKING_STATUSES = ["confirmed", "pending", "reschedule_pending"]` at module level and reference everywhere.

Test-infra gap: DB had ZERO docs in mentor_weekly_availability collection across all 26 mentors. This means availability and booking are effectively untestable in this environment without seeding. Tests now seed 09:00-17:00 for all 7 days (TEST_avail_* ids, cleaned on teardown). Consider a dev seed script.
seed_data_creation: Seeded mentor_weekly_availability for the first mentor (mentor-aparajita) with 09:00-17:00 slots on all 7 days using TEST_avail_* ids. Also seeded and cleaned up TEST_* bookings for each status parametrization. Both are torn down via module-scoped autouse fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_booking_status_filter_parity.py is the regression suite for this P0. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=... MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=gradnext pytest backend/tests/test_booking_status_filter_parity.py. It self-seeds weekly_availability and cleans up TEST_ prefixed docs. If adding tests that book many slots, use user_type=pinnacle (unlimited) to avoid quota-exhaustion flakiness — the fullprep user only has 10 sessions and ~8 get consumed by the parametrized runs.

coverage_detail.forward_backward_blocking: Verified: 9:30 booking (60min) still blocks 9:00 (backward) and 9:30 (forward) in both availability AND book endpoints.
coverage_detail.earliest_slots: Endpoint returns 200 and does not fail when cancelled-status bookings exist; uses same filter as availability.
coverage_detail.admin_cancel_rebook_e2e: User A books -> DB status flipped to admin_cancelled -> User B successfully rebooks same (date,slot) with 200. Original P0 bug repro passes.
